title: Crumbly Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Coffee Bean Crumble
description: This herbal crumbly dish features whole milk sauteed with raw-friendly coffee beans for a solo-dinner treat.
instructions: Heat the whole milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
In another pan, melt the butter over low heat. Add Yirgacheffe coffee beans and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Pour the milk into the coffee bean mixture and stir well to combine. Let it simmer gently for about 5-7 minutes until thickened.
Remove from heat, add salt and herbs, and mix thoroughly. Allow it to cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm as a crumble or sprinkle with extra fresh herbs for garnish.
